standups.title: Neural Sync Interface
standups.tooltip_interface: High-fidelity voice uplink to specific agents or mission clusters for direct neural coordination.
standups.tooltip_agent: Direct sync with a specific sovereign agent node.
standups.tooltip_cluster: Broadcast sync to all agents within a mission cluster
standups.tooltip_end: Terminate neural uplink and close channel.
standups.tooltip_start: Initialize sovereign channel for neural handoff.
standups.tooltip_transcript: Live stream of processed neural communications and STT translations.
standups.msg_online: System: Voice Communications Online. Select target and click 'Start Sync'.
standups.msg_failed: System: Transcription failed or no audio detected.
